title: Cyclosorus sakayensis

uses: Cyclosorus sakayensis is a species of fern that has been found to possess several medicinal properties. It is traditionally used in the Philippines to treat various health conditions, including fever and respiratory issues. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may contribute to its medicinal effects. Further research is needed to fully understand the potential health benefits of Cyclosorus sakayensis. More studies are required to confirm its effectiveness and safety as a medicinal treatment.
